% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for schedule_transition_distance_histogram
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}

\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyOne\else\newif\ifShowStrategyOne\ShowStrategyOnetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyTwo\else\newif\ifShowStrategyTwo\ShowStrategyTwotrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyThree\else\newif\ifShowStrategyThree\ShowStrategyThreetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFour\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFour\ShowStrategyFourtrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFive\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFive\ShowStrategyFivetrue\fi
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={Relocation distance [m]},
    ylabel={Count},
    grid=major,
    ybar,
    bar width=3pt,
    legend pos=north east,
  ]
    \ifShowStrategyThree
    \addplot[draw=none, fill=DistributedMovableColor, fill opacity=0.55, bar shift=-6.0pt] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy3[short]}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFour
    \addplot[draw=none, fill=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, fill opacity=0.55, bar shift=0.0pt] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy4[short]}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFive
    \addplot[draw=none, fill=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, fill opacity=0.55, bar shift=6.0pt] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy5[short]}
    \fi
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
